metadata.description: Official Claude Code plugins for Weftly — agent-native transcription, summarization, and more via MPP payments

plugins.name: weftly-setup
plugins.description: One-shot setup for the Weftly MCP server and mppx wallet payments in Claude Code

plugins.name: weftly-setup-dev
plugins.description: Dev-mode setup for Weftly MCP + mppx wallet payments. Points at api.dev.weftly.ai and Tempo Moderato testnet (chain 42431). Internal testing only.

plugins.name: weftly-editing
plugins.description: Transcribe local audio/video via Weftly and run editing skills (filler removal, intro hook identification) on the output.
